summary: Iteration 62 - Full Regression Test PASSED. All backend APIs working (17/17 pass). Fixed PayID create-reference MongoDB bug (was setting _id: None). Mobile UI tests passed: login, dashboard, case detail, tabs, delete buttons, AI Progress button, Reports tab.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: PayID create-reference endpoint in server.py (line 2412) was incorrectly setting '_id: None' causing MongoDB duplicate key error. Fixed to just insert payment_record without explicit _id
Dashboard: Red delete buttons visible on case cards with trash icon
CaseDetail: Header has red 'Delete Case' button, all tabs (Documents, Timeline, Grounds, Notes, Reports, Legal, Progress) visible
Progress Tab: 'AI Analyse Progress' button with purple gradient styling present
Scroll-to-top: FastScrollTop component renders Home and Scroll buttons when scrollY > 420px on landing page
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test case 'Delete Me Case'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs and UI working. PayID endpoints tested (create-reference, verify). Terms acceptance modal requires clicking label text 'I have read, understood, and agree' to toggle checkbox. ScrollToTop buttons appear after 420px scroll threshold.

All tabs visible (Timeline, Grounds, Reports, Progress, Notes) - PASS
Header Delete Case button red styled - PASS
